identity.name: SepulangDinas
identity.description: A mobile-first SaaS for nurses that feels like a relief, not a chore. Clean lines, soft colors, and generous spacing to reduce cognitive load after long shifts.

primary.description: Teal-600: Healing, professional, calm. Use for main actions.

secondary.description: Orange-500: Warmth, energy, urgent actions. Use for 'Generate' or 'Urgent'.

accent.description: Teal-50: Very soft background for active states or cards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all rounded-lg h-12

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden

badges.default: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements (Mobile First).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the custom colors (Teal/Orange) and extend the borderRadius to 'xl', '2xl'.
2. FONT SETUP: Import Nunito and Inter in index.css. Set Nunito for headings and Inter for body.
3. MOBILE FIRST: Always design for mobile view first (PWA). Use 'hidden md:block' for desktop-only elements.
4. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI as base but apply the 'rounded-2xl' and 'shadow-sm' styles defined in design_system.components.
5. NAVIGATION: Implement a Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile views (Home, Logbook, Reports, Profile). Sidebar for Desktop.
6. FORMS: Use large inputs (h-12) and clear labels. Group related fields in 'Card' containers.
7. EXPORT: Use named exports for components, default for pages.
9. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for login/hero sections.
10. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for backgrounds unless very subtle.
Don't center everything. Left align text for readability.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Ensure all buttons have loading states.
